title: Create Doom Battle Royale game with kill and revive mechanics

requirements.text: Create a 3D first-person shooter game environment using Three.js with React Three Fiber that resembles classic Doom aesthetics (retro sci-fi corridors, industrial textures, dark atmospheric lighting)

quotes: Doom Battle Royale का गेम बनाओ

acceptanceCriteria: Game renders in 3D first-person perspective
Environment includes multiple rooms or areas for battle royale gameplay
Visual style matches Doom-inspired retro FPS aesthetic
Player can move using keyboard controls (WASD)

requirements.text: Implement player combat mechanics with shooting functionality that allows players to eliminate opponents
acceptanceCriteria: Player can aim and shoot using mouse controls
Weapons deal damage to other players
Visual feedback for hits and eliminations
Health system tracks player damage

requirements.text: Implement revive/respawn system that allows eliminated players to return to the game

quotes: रिवाइब करने का भी मुकबा मिले

acceptanceCriteria: Eliminated players can respawn after a delay or trigger
Respawn location is clearly defined
Player retains or resets appropriate game state on revival
UI clearly indicates when revival is available

requirements.text: Create battle royale game loop with match start, player elimination tracking, and victory conditions

quotes: Doom Battle Royale का गेम बनाओ

acceptanceCriteria: Match begins with multiple players in the arena
Game tracks eliminations and displays leaderboard
Clear victory condition when one player/team remains
Option to start new match after completion

requirements.text: Implement player state management on backend to track health, position, eliminations, and match status
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores player health and alive/dead status
Backend tracks elimination counts per player
Backend maintains current match state
Backend validates combat actions and respawns

requirements.text: Design a dark, industrial visual theme with neon accent colors (red, orange, green) reminiscent of classic Doom, using bold typography and atmospheric lighting effects throughout the UI and game environment
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses dark backgrounds with neon accent colors
Typography reflects retro FPS game aesthetic
UI elements are consistent with chosen theme
Game environment lighting matches atmospheric style

constraints: Must work in web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
Must be playable on both desktop and mobile devices
No external game engine installations required
Use only Three.js with React Three Fiber for 3D rendering
nonGoals: Play Store or App Store distribution
Voice chat or text chat features

required: Retro sci-fi corridor texture with industrial pipes and panels for game walls (wall-texture.dim_512x512.png)
Dark metallic floor texture with grated metal pattern (floor-texture.dim_512x512.png)
Neon red crosshair reticle for weapon aiming (crosshair.dim_64x64.png)
Stylized weapon icon showing futuristic gun for UI (weapon-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Health bar background with damaged metal effect (health-bg.dim_256x64.png)
Doom-style logo with aggressive angular letters and red glow effect (logo.dim_400x150.png)
